items.title: The Space Data Centers Situation is Insane
items.author: Real Engineering
items.content:
<article>Subscribe to IEEE Spectrum Magazine and get 20% off: https://spectrum.ieee.org/realengineeringsummer

Read IEEE Spectrum's article on orbital data centers by Andrew Cavalier: https://spectrum.ieee.org/orbital-data-centers-heat 

Watch this video ad free on Nebula: https://nebula.tv/videos/realengineering-the-truth-about-space-data-centers/

Links to everything I do: 
https://beacons.ai/brianmcmanus

Get your Real Engineering shirts at: https://standard.tv/collections/real-engineering
